entity: Restaurant Brands International Inc. and subsidiaries

revenue_recognition.franchise_royalties: Recognized as franchisee sales occur (point-in-time for royalties based on Gross Sales)
revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Initial franchise fees recognized over franchise agreement term (performance obligation satisfied over time)
revenue_recognition.property_revenues: Recognized on straight-line basis over lease term for operating leases
revenue_recognition.supply_chain_sales: Recognized at point of delivery to restaurant
revenue_recognition.advertising_revenues: Contributions recognized as franchisee sales occur; advertising expenses recognized as incurred

impairment.policy: Annual impairment testing for goodwill and indefinite-lived intangible assets; property/equipment reviewed for impairment when events indicate carrying amount may not be recoverable
impairment.carrols_bk_reporting_unit: Critical audit matter identified by KPMG regarding fair value determination of Carrols BK reporting unit goodwill

income_tax.current_expense_2025: Canadian federal $109M, provincial $8M, plus US and other jurisdictions

lease_accounting.lessor: ~4,700 restaurant properties leased/subleased to franchisees under operating, direct financing, and sales-type leases

vie.note: No variable interest entities disclosed for PLK segment

subsequent_events.disclosed: Not separately noted for PLK. RBI-level: no material subsequent events identified beyond normal course

related_party.timwen_partnership: 50% JV with Wendy's for Canadian restaurant real estate. Distributions: $15M (2025). Rent expense: $21M (2025).
related_party.carrols_acquisition: Carrols Restaurant Group acquisition completed May 16, 2024 — added ~1,000 Burger King restaurants to company-owned portfolio
related_party.plk_guarantor_status: PLK is a guarantor on RBI's Credit Facilities and Senior Notes
related_party.intercompany: Advertising expenses include $303M for PLK segment in both 2025 and 2024

advertising_fund.accounting: Contributions recognized as franchisee sales occur; expenses recognized as incurred
